name: Rabin Karp Algorithm
statement: Given a string text and a string pattern, implement the Rabin-Karp algorithm to find the starting index of all occurrences of pattern in text. If pattern is not found, return an empty list.

examples.output: [2, 5, 10] Expalanation : The pattern "abc" is found at indices 2, 5, and 10 in the text.

examples.explanation: The pattern "ll" is found at index 2 in the text.

testcases.name: Case 1
testcases.expected: [2, 5, 10] Expalanation : The pattern "abc" is found at indices 2, 5, and 10 in the text.
